project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis system with CLI, REST API, MCP server, dashboard, and bot integrations
test_framework: pytest with class-based tests in tests/
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest tests/ -v and confirm all tests pass. 2. Run augur --help to verify CLI commands are registered.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.11. No Docker daemon available for actual builds.
contribution_requirements: snake_case variables, no mandatory new dependencies (use optional extras), keep score 0-10, PR title format: fix:/feat:/docs:
key_patterns: Click CLI commands in cli.py, dataclass-based models in personas/base.py, AgentRegistry pattern, JSONL file storage for backtest records
directory_structure: src/augur/ (main package), tests/ (pytest), dashboard/ (web UI), personas/ (YAML configs), config/ (agent config), skills/ (MCP skills)
